atomic_facts.fact: A person is holding a gold Huawei smartphone.
The phone screen initially displays a home screen with various app icons.
A green lightsaber graphic is visible on the home screen.
The 'App Center' icon has a red notification badge with the number 20.
A finger taps on the pink contacts icon.
The screen changes to a light blue menu with contact options.
The text 'Yellow pages' is visible at the top of the new menu.
The text 'Sign in to an account' is visible below 'Yellow pages'.
The text 'Import contacts' is visible below 'Sign in to an account'.
The text 'Create a new contact' is visible at the bottom of the menu.

spatial: The person's hands are in the foreground, holding the Huawei smartphone in the center. On the phone's screen, the 'App Center' icon is to the left of the 'Themes' icon, which is to the left of the 'Settings' icon. The 'Camera' icon is to the right of the 'Settings' icon. Below these, the phone icon is to the left of the contacts icon. After the contacts icon is tapped, a new menu appears with 'Yellow pages' above 'Sign in to an account', which is above 'Import contacts', which is above 'Create a new contact'.

The bottom section features the Android Authority brand logo.
The text 'IFA 2015' is positioned above the text 'ANDROID AUTHORITY COVERAGE'.

spatial: The red IFA 2015 logo is located in the top center of the frame, positioned above the white text 'IFA 2015'. The Android Authority logo, consisting of a green robot and text, is located in the bottom section of the frame, below the IFA 2015 branding.

green and white logo featuring a stylized Android robot mascot next to the text 'ANDROID AUTHORITY'
